name: tmos-atc-converter
description: Convert F5 TMOS configuration to AS3 Classic and Declarative Onboarding declarations

scripts.copy-vendor: mkdir -p dist/vendor/f5-appsvcs-classic-schema/lib dist/vendor/f5-appsvcs-classic-schema/schema/latest dist/vendor/f5-do/lib && cp src/vendor/f5-appsvcs-classic-schema/lib/properties.json dist/vendor/f5-appsvcs-classic-schema/lib/ && cp src/vendor/f5-appsvcs-classic-schema/schema/latest/adc-schema.json dist/vendor/f5-appsvcs-classic-schema/schema/latest/ && cp src/vendor/f5-do/lib/configItems.json dist/vendor/f5-do/lib/ && cp -r src/vendor/f5-do/schema dist/vendor/f5-do/
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build
